seed_instruction: Write a response email to your employee, approving their requested vacation days.
org_constraint: The second paragraph must approve the vacation days.
new_constraint: Do not approve the requested vacation days in the second paragraph.
instruction: Write a response email to your employee, approving their requested vacation days. The second paragraph must approve the vacation days. Do not approve the requested vacation days in the second paragraph.
response:
Subject: Vacation Request Update

Dear [Employee Name],

Thank you for submitting your time-off request for the upcoming month. I appreciate you providing this notice well in advance, as it helps the team coordinate our project timelines and ensure that all responsibilities are covered during your absence.

I am pleased to inform you that your vacation request for [Dates] has been officially approved. Please make sure to update the shared team calendar and set your out-of-office email notification before you head out.

Please let me know if there are any specific tasks you would like to hand over to the team before your leave begins.

Best regards,

[Your Name]<turn|>
